name: Dr Buhong Liu
title: Lecturer in Finance
biography: Buhong Liu holds a PhD in Computer Science from King's College London, UK, and a BSc in Applied Mathematics and Financial Mathematics from Wuhan University, China. He also studied microeconomics and financial mathematics at LSE and Imperial College London. Before joining SOAS, he was a Lecturer in Financial Economics at Adam Smith Business School, University of Glasgow. He also worked as a data scientist and a quantitative researcher in London.
